next_action: Use an explicit codex exec benchmark prompt-load repair rerun: read-only workers, fixed tasks, captured JSONL/final artifacts, typed KrnBenchmarkReport output, and before/after delta comparison.
overclaim_boundary: codex exec is not continuous goal conversation; it is an explicit worker lane, and even a repair rerun does not prove lift below the gate.
rationale: Interactive goals and worker evals solve different problems, so the prompt-load repair attempt should measure behavior without pretending to be an autonomous conversational loop.
